records.产品名称（英文）: ATOMFAIR® dTitre-Pro 10 mL Electronic Titration / Dispensing System
records.简介: The dTitre-Pro 10 mL electronic titration and dispensing system is configured for laboratory titration, dispensing, aspiration, and controlled liquid-transfer workflows where the maximum single transfer volume is 10 mL. It supports program-based operation and experiment-record handling for repeated method execution in chemical analysis, food testing, water analysis, and related laboratory applications. This 10 mL specification is separated from the 25 mL and 50 mL versions because the working range, minimum transfer volume, speed range, and accuracy table are specification-dependent.
records.代码:
ATOMFAIR® dTitre-Pro 10 mL Electronic Titration / Dispensing System

Product Type: Electronic Titrator
Atomfair Model: AF-LH-DTITRE-PRO-10ML
Research-grade liquid handling platform

Product Overview

The dTitre-Pro 10 mL electronic titration and dispensing system is configured for laboratory titration, dispensing, aspiration, and controlled liquid-transfer workflows where the maximum single transfer volume is 10 mL.

The instrument supports program-based operation and preserves experiment records, making it suitable for repeated method execution and documentation in chemical analysis, food testing, water analysis, and related laboratory applications.

This 10 mL specification is separated as its own Atomfair order model because the working range, minimum transfer volume, speed range, and accuracy table differ from the 25 mL and 50 mL specifications.

Key Features and Advantages

  • Electronic operation supports controlled titration, dispensing and liquid-transfer workflows.
  • Model-specific volume range and accuracy values are preserved as separate ordering rows.
  • Suitable for chemical analysis, food industry, water analysis and other laboratory titration or dispensing tasks.
  • Accessories and software modules are listed separately for complete configuration.

Technical Specifications

ParameterSpecification / Available Values
Source productdTitre-Pro electronic titrator
Volume specification10 mL
Working range0.010 mL to 99.999 mL; single maximum transfer 10 mL; minimum 10 uL
Speed / dispensing range0.1-2 mL/s
Working temperature range10-30 C
Quality standardISO 8655
Bluetooth functionAvailable
WiFi functionAvailable
Control modeSupports program control; dFlow-Pro supports automatic dispensing programs and manual/custom dispensing modes
Battery capacity3500 mAh
Memory1000 experiment records
Screen4.3-inch TFT touch screen, 800 x 480 resolution
PC interfaceType-C and WiFi
Weight1.2 kg

Atomfair Product Ordering and Configuration Table

AF-LH-DTITRE-PRO-10ML10 mL5 mLSystematic error +/-20 uL +/-0.4%CV +/-7 uL +/-0.14%
AF-LH-DTITRE-PRO-10ML10 mL1 mLSystematic error +/-20 uL +/-2.0%CV +/-7 uL +/-0.7%

Ordering Standard: Each titrator, dispenser, volume specification, accessory or software module receives a unique Atomfair order model.
